HRES 84 EH
H. Res. 84
In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
February 21, 1991.
  Resolved, That the following named Members be, and they are hereby, elected
  to the following joint committees of Congress to serve with the chairman
  of the Committee on House Administration:
  JOINT COMMITTEE ON PRINTING: Mr. Gejdenson, Connecticut; Mr. Kleczka,
  Wisconsin; Mr. Roberts, Kansas; and Mr. Gingrich, Georgia.
  JOINT COMMITTEE OF CONGRESS ON THE LIBRARY: Mr. Kolter, Pennsylvania;
  Mr. Manton, New York; Mr. Barrett, Nebraska; and Mr. Roberts, Kansas.
Attest:
Clerk.
